rules.description: Fix volume keys on macOS beta

to.shell_command: sleep 0.05; /usr/bin/osascript -e 'set currentVolume to output volume of (get volume settings)' -e 'set newVolume to currentVolume + 5' -e 'if newVolume > 100 then set newVolume to 100' -e 'set volume output volume newVolume'

sleep 0.05; /usr/bin/osascript -e 'set currentVolume to output volume of (get volume settings)' -e 'set newVolume to currentVolume - 5' -e 'if newVolume < 0 then set newVolume to 0' -e 'set volume output volume newVolume'
